arts.ttl: FC Porto stance on possibility of Arsenal recalling Fábio Vieira this month
arts.sum: In his pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League tie against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday, Mikel Arteta touched upon Fábio Vieira’s situation at FC Porto. arts.ttl: Boy arrested after Arsenal star Kai Havertz and wife abused online following Man Utd loss
arts.sum: Havertz's wife, Sophia, posted some of the messages sent to her Instagram account in the hours following the match. The Arsenal attacker was abused online following the penalty shootout defeat to Manchester United earlier this month.

arts.ttl: 'It's unbelievable': Leandro Trossard says Arsenal have a youngster on their books who is actually 'so strong'
Police arrest 17-year-old over social media abuse sent to Kai Havertz’s wife
arts.sum: Police have arrested a teenage boy in connection with social media abuse sent to Arsenal forward Kai Havertz's pregnant wife. Police arrest 17-year-old over social media abuse sent to Kai Havertz’s wife

arts.ttl: Teenage boy arrested over social media abuse of Arsenal star Kai Havertz and pregnant wife
arts.sum: Kai Havertz, 25, missed the decisive spot-kick in an FA Cup penalty shootout against Manchester United earlier this month which cemented his side’s third-round exit

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta praises wonderkid, 15, training with Arsenal first-team - but reveals problem
arts.sum: 15-year-old Max Dowman has been training with the Arsenal first-team and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has hinted he could make his debut if some "issues" with red tape do not prevent it

arts.ttl: Arsenal beat both Real Madrid and Barcelona in Champions League battle
arts.sum: What is most surprising is that Arsenal, currently second in the Premier League but six points behind Liverpool (with one game in hand), is ranked above Flick’s Barcelona and Ancelotti’s Real Madrid . Arsenal favoured in Champions League over Madrid and Barça
